setting.note: Eliot’s Florence of 1492, researched to the stone: the Piazza della Signoria where Savonarola burns the vanities, the Duomo, the Ponte Vecchio, San Marco. It brings George Eliot into the atlas, and a second Florence four centuries before A Room with a View.
